text_excerpt: News | Alberto Costa Skip to main content Alberto Costa Conservative MP for South Leicestershire Main navigation About Alberto News Campaigns In Parliament Contact Apply now: Alberto Costa's Westminster Summer School (16-19 year olds) Surgeries Alberto Costa Conservative MP for South Leicestershire News A View From Westminster, by Alberto Costa Wednesday, 11 March, 2026 Restoring Parliament: Getting the Balance Right One of the biggest long-term decisions facing Parliament is what to do about the restoration of the Palace of Westminster. No one disputes that the building needs major work. It is a UNESCO World Heritage Site, a symbol of our democracy, and the place where our laws are debated and passed. But how we carry out those works matters enormously...
